infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Amlakey to use your location to map your properties.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Amlakey to use Face ID to unlock the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Amlakey to access your photos to attach images to maintenance requests.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Amlakey to use your camera to take photos for maintenance requests.

web.name: Amlakey - Property Manager
web.description: Your Smart Property Manager - مدير أملاكك الذكي

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to map your properties.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to map your properties.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Amlakey to use Face ID to unlock the app.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Amlakey to access your photos to attach images to maintenance requests.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Amlakey to use your camera to take photos for maintenance requests.
